meaning: adj.芒刺多的,(说话时)有粗喉音的
examples: There is nobody here. We needn't have been in such a burry.
I am a volcano quiet in many years I wish one day the magma burry in my mind will spout to the sky!
The socially awkward Mr Burry, a one-eyed fund manager with Asperger's syndrome, avoided contact with people if he could help it.
You have Worm's Head on one side and Burry Holms on the other side.
Accompanying all this are Burry's incisive reports, as good as anything from Wall Street.
